value.description: Prioritize permanent identity over temporary promotions.
All URLs must come from verified crawl discovery, never invented.
Do not create facts, claims, URLs, awards, or certifications not found on-site.

Maintain parent company and product line separation.
Clearly differentiate Sales, Service, Parts, and Finance.
Public claims must align with approved safe claims and compliance rules.
